name: Multi-Omics Analysis Reveals Biomarkers That Contribute to Biological Age Rejuvenation in Response to Single-Blinded Randomized Placebo-Controlled Therapeutic Plasma Exchange
summary: A randomized placebo-controlled trial in adults over 50 reporting biological-age, proteomic, glycomic, metabolomic, immune, and epigenetic-marker changes after TPE, TPE plus IVIG, or sham.
